title: Two-Factor Authentication Bypass
html: Stub. Spitmo and ZeusMitmo work in tandem with desktop malware: the desktop side phishes the user into installing the mobile component, which then intercepts the SMS one-time-codes that banks rely on as the "second factor." First documented evidence (per Felt et al.) that 2FA-via-SMS is structurally insufficient. First mentioned in 2025 06 01 mobile malware credentials sms.

related.label: App security checklist — MFA, RBAC/RLS, E2E, audit logs
Mobile malware survey — credential theft, premium SMS, 2FA bypass, IMEI defenses
Mobile malware survey (Felt et al.) — methodology, data set, novelty/amusement, selling user info
